final:
// // This module implements a 4-to-1 demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
module top_module(
  input in0,
  input in1,
  input in2,
  input in3,
  input sel0,
  input sel1,
  output out
);assign out = (sel1 == 0 && sel0 == 0) ? in0 :
               (sel1 == 0 && sel0 == 1) ? in1 :
               (sel1 == 1 && sel0 == 0) ? in2 :
               (sel1 == 1 && sel0 == 1) ? in3 :
               1'bx;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
